name: Glaxion
description: Fires a photon beam that halts molecular vibrations, causing instant and painful freezing.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Fires a photon beam that halts molecular vibrations, causing instant and painful freezing.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Glaxion beam FX issues when used by Corpus enemies from a distance away.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.changes: The Glaxion Vandal is now tradable.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Glaxion Festive Skin missing its jolly green glowy lights when equipped on the Glaxion Vandal.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Energy color not applying to the Glaxion Vandal’s Festive Skin.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies appearing ‘stretched’ when dying from the Glaxion.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Removed the Cryotra from being able to have Glaxion Rivens equipped. Sentinel weapons no longer generate Rivens as noted in Update 24.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes: Glaxion magazine capacity reduced to 30 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.3
patchlogs.changes: Minor tweaks to reload timing on Glaxion and Gammacor.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.7.2
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the force feedback when firing the Glaxion with a controller.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
The Ice Beam weapon: the Glaxion. Probably one of the most exciting weapons to imagine in combat, yet it has received a cold reception.
Increased the Accuracy of the Glaxion.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Amprex, Flux Rifle, Glaxion, Embolist, Gammacor series, Nukor, Spectra, Panthera, Synapse, Sobek, Drakgoon and Lanka can now be used in Conclave!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.2
patchlogs.changes: •    Decreased the rumble amount on controllers when continuously firing the Atomos, Gammacor, Glaxion, and Amprex.•    Changed the damage radius of hull breaches in Corpus tilesets to affect the entire room, not just a small area near the breach. Fixing in another Hotfix.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Added in stealth takedown sounds for the Redeemer when used on enemies frozen via the Glaxion.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.8.1
patchlogs.changes: Visual Effects tweak to the Glaxion: Ambient fog added!

patchlogs.name: Update 14.6.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased the proc chance of the Glaxion.
Limited the maximum amount Glaxion firing sound effects.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.5.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Glaxion Changes:
Improved the performance of frozen death effects from the Glaxion.
Improved the ammo consumption and critical chance on the Glaxion.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.changes: More than 3000 pts = Latron Wraith and the Polar Glaxion skin
